arts.ttl: Second only to one man: Flick reaches Barcelona milestone in incredible manner
arts.sum: While much of the scoring burden falls on Robert Lewandowski and Raphinha, Barcelona’s attack has found goals from a variety of players. Flick’s achievement places him in the club’s history books as the second-fastest coach to reach 100 goals, behind only Helenio Herrera, who managed it in 31 matches back in 1959 – only one fewer than Flick.

arts.ttl: ‘I’m 100% now’ - De Jong ready to ‘prove’ he deserves place in Flick’s Barca team
arts.sum: I’m happy to win again in the league and I hope we can continue like this to be closer to the top. “We’ve had a bad run in the league and I hope this is the way forward and we can continue like this,” he said, via Marca.

arts.ttl: Focus and finishing from Fermin, Ferran & Frenkie make Barca unstoppable
arts.sum: Fermin would add his second and Barca’s fifth before the half-time whistle blew with another stunning finish, and it capped off what has to be one of the most one-sided halves of football ever seen in the Spanish top-flight. Though this Valencia are about as far removed as the brilliant Los Che sides of the past that were routinely in the top half of the table, that should take nothing away from the manner in which the hosts set about their task - and stuck to it.

arts.ttl: ‘Not the best situation for Inaki ’ - Flick talks Barca goalkeepers
arts.sum: The German coach handed Wojciech Szczęsny another start, despite his recent errors, and left Pena on the bench for the match. Hansi Flick spoke about the goalkeeping situation after Barcelona’s 7-1 win over Valencia on Sunday and admitted it’s “not the best situation for Inaki Pena.”

arts.ttl: ‘I needed these goals’ - Fermin delighted with Barca double
arts.sum: “I think we were having a bad run in the league and we needed this win. The 21-year-old scored twice and grabbed two assists as Hansi Flick’s men got back to winning ways in the Spanish top flight.

arts.ttl: Flick reveals Gavi’s selfless gesture during Barcelona’s win
arts.sum: Gavi was one of several players given at rest at Montjuic but Flick did want to bring him on in the second half of the match. I love Gavi, he’s top notch,” he told reporters.

arts.ttl: Barcelona scores four goals in opening 24 minutes and overwhelms Valencia 7-1 in Spanish league
arts.sum: Barcelona overwhelmed Valencia in the Spanish league on Sunday with four different players scoring in the first 24 minutes of a 7-1 victory . The victory moved Barcelona within three points of second-placed Atletico Madrid and seven points off leader Real Madrid, which won 3-0 at Valladolid on Saturday with a hat trick by Kylian Mbappé .

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s 7-1 thriller exposes their secret weapon-and a glaring weakness
arts.sum: Anyone who watched Barcelona dismantle Valencia and then glanced at LaLiga’s standings would struggle to understand how this team isn’t dominating the league. Barcelona delivered a brutal performance to crush Valencia, with the scoreboard already showing a 5-0 lead by halftime.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star fires warning to Real Madrid after dominant win over Valencia
arts.sum: Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong has on Sunday night sent something of a warning to arch rivals Real Madrid. This of course comes fresh off an outing to remember for…
